mapper.select: SELECT intIndex, strResIP, strResName, strRank, strS_IP , strS_PORT, strD_IP, strD_PORT, strS_MAC, strD_MAC , strProtocol, strIPv4ToS, strChannel, strIP, strPort , strMAC, strInterface, strSenderIP, strIn_Interface, strOut_Interface , strBytes, strUnit, dateRegDate FROM catchview.xe_sflow_log WHERE intIndex > #{interrIdx} ORDER BY intIndex LIMIT 1000
SELECT intIndex, strResIP, strResName, strRank, strProtocol , strBytes, strUnit, dateRegDate FROM catchview.xe_sflow_protocol_log WHERE intIndex > #{interrIdx} ORDER BY intIndex LIMIT 1000
